title: EMIful Progression
body:
Adds [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) support for [Peaceful Progression](https://modrinth.com/mod/peaceful-progression) Effigy Altar recipes.

Also adds English translations for some untranslated item tags - namely `c:guano`, `peaceful-items:wisp_dislikes` and `peaceful-items:wisp_likes`.

Pretty straightforward, threw this together in like two hours.
